steps.title: Test each table
steps.content: For the shared $x$-values, the boundary values are $$5(2)+7=17,$$ $$5(4)+7=27,$$ and $$5(6)+7=37.$$ The listed $y$-values must be greater than $17$, $27$, and $37$, respectively.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: The correct table has $x$-values $2$, $4$, and $6$ paired with $y$-values $20$, $33$, and $46$. Each listed $y$-value is greater than the matching boundary value: $$20\gt 17,$$ $$33\gt 27,$$ and $$46\gt 37.$$ The other tables fail at least one row, so A is correct.
